steps: Add 936 mL Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 10 mL NaNO 3 (stock solution: 25.00 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Sodium nitrate P212121
Add 10 mL CaCl 2 *2H 2 O (stock solution: 2.50 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Calcium Chloride Contributed by users
Add 10 mL MgSO 4 *7H 2 O( stock solution: 7.50 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Magnesium Sulfate P212121
Add 10 mL K 2 HPO 4 (stock solution: 7.50 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Potassium phosphate (dibasic) P212121
Add 10 mL KH 2 PO 4 (stock solution: 17.50 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Potassium phosphate (monobasic) P212121
Add 10 mL NaCl (stock solution: 2.50 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234
Add 1 mL Alkakine EDTA solution (stock solution: EDTA at 50.00 g*L -1 dH 2 0 and KOH at 31.00 g*L -1 dH 2 O) Potassium hydroxide P212121 EDTA Contributed by users
Add 1 mL FeSO 4 *7H 2 O (stock solution: 4.98 g*L -1 dH 2 0) Iron (II) sulfate Fisher Scientific Catalog #7782-63-0
Add 1 mL H 2 SO 4 Sulfuric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #A300C-212
Add 1 mL H 3 BO 3 (11.42 g*L -1 dH 2 O) Boric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP1681
Add 1 mL ZnSO 4 *7H 2 O (8.82 g*L -1 dH 2 O) Zinc sulfate Contributed by users
Add 1 mL MnCl 2 *4H 2 O (1.44 g*L -1 dH 2 O) Manganese chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #7773-01-5
Add 1 mL MoO 3 (0.71 g*L -1 dH 2 O) Molybdic acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #7782-91-4
Add 1 mL CuSO 4 *5H 2 O (1.57 g*L -1 H 2 O) Copper Sulfate P212121
Add 1 mL Co(NO 3 ) 2 *6H 2 O (0.49 g*L -1 dH 2 O) Cobalt (II) nitrate hexahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #10026-22-9
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
